_meta.purpose: Stage 0 — empirical dataset retention (decision #22). Pivots over all log indices grouped by data_stream.dataset; computes first_log (min @timestamp = earliest log = empirical searchable horizon start) and last_log (max @timestamp). Writes one doc per dataset to m_26_14-retention; the m_26_14-retention-horizon dest pipeline computes horizon_days = (ingest_time - first_log) / 86400000. This replaces ILM/tier/snapshot introspection: we measure realized retention rather than policy promises. After data changes, re-execute the m_26_14-observed-enrich policy so Stage 1 picks up fresh horizons. Frequency: 1h (same source pattern as m_26_14-observed-assets). Run BEFORE m_26_14-score-dataset-retention and m_26_14-score-entity.
